briefdescription.para: This structure defines the onfi command format sent to the flash.
This function reads the data from flash.

detaileddescription.para: It is used for reading the control information from flash like ID and Parameter page.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XNandPs instance.
is the buffer pointer to read the data.
is the length of data to read.

briefdescription.para: This function sends reset command to the flash device.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XNandPs instance.

briefdescription.para: This function sends read ID command to the flash device.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XNandPs instance.

briefdescription.para: This function sends read parameter page command to the flash device.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XNandPs instance.

briefdescription.para: This function calculates the CRC on the parameter page buffer.

detaileddescription.para: This is taken from the ONFI 1.0 specification.

parameterdescription.para: is the parameter page buffer.

briefdescription.para: This function reads the NAND flash parameter page defined by ONFI 1.0 specification.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XNandPs instance.
is a buffer pointer to fill the data.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if parameter page read successfully.
XST_FAILURE if parameter page is not read successfully.

briefdescription.para: This function sends a NAND command to the flash device.

parameterdescription.para: is the pointer to XNandPs structure
is the NAND command to send
is the page offset required for specific commands
the column offset required for specific commands

briefdescription.para: This function writes command data to flash.

detaileddescription.para: It is used for writing the control information like set features.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XNandPs instance.
is the buffer pointer to write the data.
is the length of data to write.

briefdescription.para: This function sends read status command to the flash device.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XNandPs instance.

briefdescription.para: This function sends Get Feature command to the flash device.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XNandPs instance.
is the feature value to read.

briefdescription.para: This function sends Set Feature command to the flash device.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XNandPs instance.
is the feature value to Set.

briefdescription.para: This function initializes the NAND flash and gets the geometry information.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XNandPs instance.
